niche: jakarta street food and cafe reviews
tone: enthusiastic, warm, slightly dramatic about food discoveries, uses slang like 'gila sih' and 'ini real'
audience: millennials and gen-z in Jakarta, 20-28, food-obsessed, middle income, frequent Grab Food users
posting_style: short narrated videos, face-to-camera or voiceover with food visuals, casual and fast-paced

niche: practical money tips for surabaya young professionals
tone: calm, older-sibling energy, uses simple clear language, avoids jargon, occasionally funny
audience: young professionals in Surabaya, 24-32, early career, earning 5-10M/month, want to be better with money but find finance content boring
posting_style: talking head with text overlays, listicle-style tips, relatable scenarios

niche: bandung lifestyle, cafe hopping, aesthetic daily life
tone: dreamy, soft-spoken, poetic but not pretentious, uses a lot of 'vibes' language
audience: gen-z in Bandung, 18-25, creative types, students and freelancers, values aesthetics and 'soft life'
posting_style: aesthetic montage with soft voiceover, lo-fi music undertone, contemplative pacing

niche: casual business talk for first-time entrepreneurs
tone: direct, encouraging, no-nonsense but not harsh, like a mentor at a warung kopi
audience: aspiring and early-stage entrepreneurs, 25-35, mostly male, java-based, running or planning small businesses
posting_style: face-to-camera monologue, strong opening hook, storytelling with a lesson
